{{Fig|[[SuperMemo 18]] makes it possible to inspect 400 independent [[Glossary:stabilization curve|stabilization curve]]s. These curves differ by levels of [[Glossary:stability|stability]] and [[Glossary:Difficulty|difficulty]]. The picture shows the curve for difficulty{{=}}0.58 and stability{{=}}59 days. The horizontal axis shows [[Glossary:retrievability|retrievability]] (as percent). The vertical axis shows [[stabilization]] (as a ratio of [[Glossary:stability|stability]]). Early repetitions bring little stabilization, and the effect of review increases rapidly with a drop to [[Glossary:retrievability|retrievability]]}}
